description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:alpine Docker image and runs a global before_script installing git, build-base and bash via apk, creates the Go workspace under /go/src, copies the project files, creates a symlink, and executes make dep. Enable a cache for the Go module directories (/go/src/github.com, /go/src/gitlab.com, /go/src/golang.org, /go/src/google.golang.org, /go/src/gopkg.in). Define two stages: test and build. In the test stage add a .race_detector job that runs make race, a code_coverage job that runs make coverage, a lint_code job that runs go get github.com/go-critic/go-critic/cmd/gocritic, then go install github.com/go-critic/go-critic/cmd/gocritic, then make lint, and a unit_tests job that runs make test. In the build stage add a build job that runs make.
